commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `process attach` action, stdin state and input-wait metadata, last-output tracking, closed-stdin guards for child and PTY sessions, docs, changelog, and regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the narrow gap from source: current main does not expose `process attach`, while the linked request asks for an attach/recover view over background interactive sessions. I did not run a live Expo or stuck-CLI reproduction in this read-only review.
